section_miscategorizations.text: A1c is elevated at 5.1, warranting further investigation prior to surgery.
section_miscategorizations.reason: The A1c value is an objective lab result and belongs in the Objective section; the interpretive phrase about it being elevated and warranting investigation could remain in Assessment, but the raw result itself should not be introduced there.

section_miscategorizations.text: Continue current medications: furosemide and torsemide 20mg daily, lisinopril 10mg daily.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These are existing medications rather than new orders or changes. While many clinicians document continuation of current meds in the Plan, per the provided template rules, current medications the patient is already taking belong in Subjective unless framed as a treatment change or new order.
